design_philosophy.core_concept: Professional grade tools meets futuristic academy. Avoid 'hacker' clichés; embrace 'high-tech laboratory'.
design_philosophy.visual_style: Deep Obsidian backgrounds, Neon-Glass surfaces, Micro-interactive touches

containers.dashboard_card: bg-surface/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 rounded-xl overflow-hidden relative

buttons.primary: relative overflow-hidden bg-white text-black font-bold px-8 py-3 rounded-none clip-path-polygon hover:bg-cyan-core transition-colors duration-300
buttons.secondary: border border-white/20 text-white px-6 py-2 rounded-none hover:border-cyan-core hover:text-cyan-core transition-all duration-300

inputs.default: bg-surface/50 border-white/10 focus:border-cyan-core/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-cyan-core/50 rounded-md placeholder:text-white/20

cursor.style: w-6 h-6 border border-cyan-core rounded-full fixed pointer-events-none mix-blend-difference z-50

visual_enhancers.scanlines: background: repeating-linear-gradient(0deg, transparent, transparent 2px, #000 3px); opacity: 0.1; pointer-events: none;

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: `yarn add framer-motion tsparticles @tsparticles/react @tsparticles/slim recharts clsx tailwind-merge`
SETUP_THEME: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'seven_color_system' immediately.
CUSTOM_CURSOR: Create a global <CustomCursor /> component that tracks mouse position and wraps the app.
NAVIGATION: Create a 'Dock' style floating navigation for the dashboard, distinct from the Landing Page nav.
AI_CHAT: The AI Assistant should feel like a 'HUD' overlay, floating on the right side, glassmorphic.
FORENSICS_LAB: Use a 'split-pane' layout. Left: File Tree/Evidence. Center: Hex Viewer/Analysis. Right: Metadata/AI Findings.
LEARNING_HUB: Use 'Course Cards' that look like 'Data Cartridges' - holographic borders, techy details.
ANIMATION_RULE: Every interactive element (button, card, link) MUST have a `whileHover` and `whileTap` prop from Framer Motion.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use default Shadcn styles. Override everything with the 'border-white/10' and 'bg-black/40' glass aesthetics.
universal_guidelines: Don't make generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters.
